name: Data Destruction via Disk Wiping Tools
description: Detects use of disk wiping tools that destroy data for impact
query:
// Detect disk wiping and data destruction tools
// Trigger on dd, format, diskpart, or known wipers
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(dd\s+if=/dev/zero|dd\s+if=/dev/urandom|format\s+[a-z]:.*\/[qQ]|diskpart.*clean|cipher\s+/w:|nuke|KillDisk)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
